hourly_summary: 本小时共收录 105 条：AI 40 条、策略交易 10 条、加密货币 25 条、世界事件 20 条、财经 10 条。重点关注：【FINANCE】为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场；【FINANCE】克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的；【FINANCE】明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息。

items.title: Why investors may want to prioritize bond markets outside the U.S.
items.summary: Allspring Global Investments is pushing clients toward countries with central banks that are raising interest rates or have different inflation dynamics.
items.title_zh: 为什么投资者可能希望优先考虑美国以外的债券市场
items.summary_zh: Allspring Global Investments 正在将客户推向央行正在加息或通胀动态不同的国家。

items.title: Cleveland Fed President Hammack says AI could fuel inflation, rate hikes may be necessary
items.summary: "We've got inflation that's too high, and it's been too high for the past five years," Beth Hammack told CNBC's Sara Eisen.
items.title_zh: 克利夫兰联储主席哈马克表示人工智能可能助长通胀，加息可能是必要的
items.summary_zh: 贝丝·哈马克 (Beth Hammack) 告诉 CNBC 的萨拉·艾森 (Sara Eisen)：“我们的通货膨胀率太高了，过去五年一直太高。”

items.title: Minneapolis Fed President Neel Kashkari says he expects a rate hike this year
items.summary: Kashkari said he sees a hike likely this year as the economy continues to feel the hit from spiking inflation.
items.title_zh: 明尼阿波利斯联储主席尼尔·卡什卡利表示，他预计今年将加息
items.summary_zh: 卡什卡利表示，由于经济继续受到通胀飙升的打击，他预计今年可能会加息。

items.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
items.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.
items.title_zh: 惠普公司与 OpenAI 建立 Frontier 战略合作伙伴关系
items.summary_zh: HP Inc. 扩大其 OpenAI Frontier 合作伙伴关系，在客户体验、软件开发和企业运营领域部署 AI。

items.title: New chip could help tiny robots traverse complex environments
items.summary: Researchers combined an efficient algorithm with dedicated hardware to rapidly generate 3D maps for navigation using minimal memory and power.
items.title_zh: 新芯片可以帮助微型机器人穿越复杂的环境
items.summary_zh: 研究人员将高效算法与专用硬件相结合，使用最少的内存和功耗快速生成用于导航的 3D 地图。

items.title: Chinese exile once linked to Trump strategist gets 30-year sentence in $1 billion fraud
items.summary: The businessman known as Miles Guo, who pushed the fraudulent H-Coin project and had close ties to Steve Bannon, was finally sentenced after his 2024 conviction.
items.title_zh: 曾与特朗普战略家有联系的中国流亡者因诈骗10亿美元被判30年徒刑
items.summary_zh: 这位名叫文贵先生的商人推动了欺诈性的H-Coin项目，并与史蒂夫·班农关系密切，在2024年定罪后最终被判刑。

items.title: Jefferies warns of crypto market volatility as Clarity Act faces Senate test
items.summary: The bank said the bill faces major hurdles, with passage boosting institutional crypto adoption and delays prolonging regulatory uncertainty.
items.title_zh: 杰富瑞警告加密货币市场波动，澄清法案面临参议院考验
items.summary_zh: 该银行表示，该法案面临重大障碍，该法案的通过促进了机构加密货币的采用，而延迟则延长了监管的不确定性。

items.title: SEC opens ETF rule review following crypto fund surge, prediction markets push
items.summary: The SEC is taking a fresh look at how a proposed fast-growing new class of ETFs tied to prediction markets should be regulated.
items.title_zh: 加密货币基金激增、预测市场推动后，SEC 启动 ETF 规则审查
items.summary_zh: 美国证券交易委员会正在重新审视如何监管拟议的与预测市场相关的快速增长的新型 ETF。

items.title: Afghan Taliban launch strikes on border with Pakistan as tensions escalate
items.summary: Pakistan's military says it shot down four rudimentary drones and will respond to any further provocation.
items.title_zh: 随着紧张局势升级，阿富汗塔利班对与巴基斯坦边境发动袭击
items.summary_zh: 巴基斯坦军方表示，他们击落了四架简陋的无人机，并将对任何进一步的挑衅做出回应。

items.title: TD Cowen slashes Strategy target to $260 on bitcoin outlook, calls new capital framework ‘constructive’
items.summary: TD Cowen cut its Strategy price target to $260 from $400 on a lower bitcoin forecast, while calling its new capital framework "constructive."
items.title_zh: TD Cowen 将比特币前景的战略目标下调至 260 美元，称新的资本框架具有“建设性”
items.summary_zh: 由于比特币预测较低，TD Cowen 将其战略目标价格从 400 美元下调至 260 美元，同时称其新的资本框架是“建设性的”。

items.title: Inaugural Music Technology Research Showcase celebrates work of new graduate program’s initial students
items.summary: Associate Professor Anna Huang delivers the keynote address, “In Search of Human-AI Resonance,” to a capacity crowd.
items.title_zh: 首届音乐技术研究展示会庆祝新研究生项目首批学生的工作
items.summary_zh: 黄安娜副教授向众多观众发表了题为“寻找人类与人工智能的共鸣”的主题演讲。

items.title: China-linked actors target more than technology as AI competition with U.S. intensifies
items.summary: Cyberattacks from China-based entities are on the rise and not just targeting specific tech, analysts warn, as the U.S. AI race intensifies.
items.title_zh: 随着与美国的人工智能竞争加剧，与中国相关的参与者的目标不仅仅是技术
items.summary_zh: 分析师警告称，随着美国人工智能竞赛的加剧，来自中国实体的网络攻击正在增加，而且不仅仅针对特定技术。

items.title: SpaceX to join the Nasdaq-100 in a fast-tracked process that will drive huge ETF buying demand
items.summary: Adding SpaceX this quickly would make the Elon Musk company one of the first beneficiaries of Nasdaq's recently adopted fast-track inclusion framework.
items.title_zh: SpaceX 将快速加入纳斯达克 100 指数，这将推动巨大的 ETF 购买需求
items.summary_zh: 如此迅速地加入 SpaceX 将使埃隆·马斯克公司成为纳斯达克最近采用的快速纳入框架的首批受益者之一。

items.title: After U.S.-Iran War, Oman Is Said to Propose Strait of Hormuz Fee Plan
items.summary: Under the proposal, Iran and Oman would collect payment for ships passing through the Strait of Hormuz, according to officials and diplomats with knowledge of the matter.
items.title_zh: 美伊战争后，据称阿曼提出霍尔木兹海峡收费计划
items.summary_zh: 据知情官员和外交官透露，根据该提议，伊朗和阿曼将为通过霍尔木兹海峡的船只收取费用。

items.title: Australian Man Charged With Homicide After Thai Teen’s Body Found in Suitcase
items.summary: The 17-year-old’s remains were found abandoned near railroad tracks in Pattaya. The suspect was arrested while trying to leave the country.
items.title_zh: 手提箱中发现泰国青少年尸体后，澳大利亚男子被控杀人罪
items.summary_zh: 这名 17 岁男孩的遗体被发现遗弃在芭堤雅的铁轨附近。嫌疑人在试图离开该国时被捕。

items.title: Trump pocketed more than $1 billion from crypto ties as industry headed toward slump
items.summary: The president has capitalized massively on crypto, according to his 2025 financial disclosure, making it one of his most lucrative business moves.
items.title_zh: 随着行业走向低迷，特朗普从加密货币关系中获利超过 10 亿美元
items.summary_zh: 根据他披露的 2025 年财务报告，总统已大量利用加密货币，使其成为他最有利可图的商业举措之一。

items.title: SEC giving novel ETFs a rethink as it opens comment period on overhauling U.S. rules
items.summary: Managers of exchange-traded funds, including those in the crypto sector, may see some changes at the Securities and Exchange Commission as it weighs its approach.
items.title_zh: 美国证券交易委员会 (SEC) 就美国规则改革开启征求意见期，对新型 ETF 进行重新思考
items.summary_zh: 交易所交易基金的管理者，包括加密货币领域的基金管理者，可能会看到美国证券交易委员会在权衡其做法时发生一些变化。

items.title: Circle craters 17% as Stripe, Coinbase and BlackRock back rival stablecoin network
items.summary: Open Standard's Open USD aims to let partners keep reserve income and eliminate minting fees, challenging Circle's USDC.
items.title_zh: 随着 Stripe、Coinbase 和 BlackRock 支持竞争对手稳定币网络，Circle 暴跌 17%
items.summary_zh: Open Standard 的 Open USD 旨在让合作伙伴保留储备收入并消除铸币费用，挑战 Circle 的 USDC。

items.title: Circle shares sink 16% after Open USD reveal, analysts say fears are ‘overblown’
items.summary: William Blair reiterated its Outperform rating on Circle's CRCL stock, calling Tuesday's selloff a buying opportunity.
items.title_zh: Open USD披露后，Circle股价下跌16%，分析师表示担忧“被夸大了”
items.summary_zh: William Blair 重申了对 Circle 旗下 CRCL 股票跑赢大盘的评级，称周二的抛售是买入机会。

items.title: MetaMask unveils all-in-one Money Account offerings users up to 4% APY on mUSD holdings
items.summary: Consensys tapped Monad as Money Account's “home chain," and will initially use Morpho vaults to generate yield.
items.title_zh: MetaMask 推出一体化货币账户，为用户持有的 mUSD 提供高达 4% 的年化收益
items.summary_zh: Consensys 将 Monad 作为 Money Account 的“主链”，最初将使用 Morpho 金库来产生收益。

items.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
items.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.
items.title_zh: 核心转储流行病学：修复 18 年前的错误
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 工程师使用大规模核心转储分析来调试罕见的基础设施崩溃，发现硬件故障和长期存在的软件错误。

items.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
items.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.
items.title_zh: 我们最新的 Google 财经升级，包括新应用
items.summary_zh: 新版 Google 财经即将结束测试版并推出新的 Android 应用程序。

items.title: A better way to model the behavior of metal alloys
items.summary: MIT researchers’ approach captures subtle atomic patterns, improving predictions of material properties.
items.title_zh: 模拟金属合金行为的更好方法
items.summary_zh: 麻省理工学院研究人员的方法捕捉微妙的原子模式，改善对材料特性的预测。

items.title: Why OpenUSD's 'real threat' that tanked Circle stock still faces a steep uphill battle for adoption
items.summary: The Stripe- and Coinbase-backed stablecoin consortium can challenge Circle's business model, but analysts say building a network is harder than assembling big-name partners.
items.title_zh: 为什么 OpenUSD 的“真正威胁”导致了 Circle 股票的下跌，但在采用方面仍然面临着一场艰苦的战斗
items.summary_zh: Stripe 和 Coinbase 支持的稳定币联盟可以挑战 Circle 的商业模式，但分析师表示，建立一个网络比组建知名合作伙伴更困难。

items.title: MetaMask launches Money Account with stablecoin yield and spending in one wallet
items.summary: The launch reflects a broader push to make stablecoins more useful beyond trading and transfers.
items.title_zh: MetaMask 推出货币账户，在一个钱包中提供稳定币收益和支出
items.summary_zh: 此次推出反映了更广泛的推动力，使稳定币在交易和转账之外发挥更大的作用。

items.title: Visa, Stripe, Coinbase and more join Open USD stablecoin that shares reserve revenue
items.summary: Expected to launch later this year, Open Standard said businesses will be able to mint and redeem Open USD without fees or volume limits.
items.title_zh: Visa、Stripe、Coinbase 等加入 Open USD 稳定币，共享储备收入
items.summary_zh: Open Standard 预计将于今年晚些时候推出，表示企业将能够铸造和兑换 Open USD，无需支付任何费用或数量限制。

items.title: Introducing GeneBench-Pro
items.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.
items.title_zh: GeneBench-Pro 简介
items.summary_zh: 隆重推出 GeneBench-Pro，这是一个使用复杂的真实数据集测试基因组学、生物学和科学研究中人工智能性能的新基准。

items.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
items.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.
items.title_zh: 预览 GPT-5.6 Sol：下一代模型
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 预览了 GPT-5.6 Sol，这是一种下一代模型，在编码、科学和网络安全方面具有更强的能力，并配有最先进的安全堆栈。

items.title: How agents are transforming work
items.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.
items.title_zh: 客服人员如何改变工作方式
items.summary_zh: 一篇新的 OpenAI 研究论文展示了人工智能代理如何改变工作方式，实现更长、更复杂的任务，并提高跨角色的生产力。

items.title: Featuring Every Eval Ever Results on Hugging Face Model Pages
items.title_zh: 在拥抱脸部模型页面上展示所有评估结果

items.title: Accelerating Transformers Fine-Tuning with NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel
items.title_zh: 使用 NVIDIA NeMo AutoModel 加速 Transformer 微调

items.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
items.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.
items.title_zh: 新研究表明我们的医疗人工智能 AMIE 如何帮助管理健康状况。
items.summary_zh: 《自然》杂志的研究表明，我们的对话式人工智能系统在复杂疾病管理方面与初级保健医生相匹配。

items.title: The latest AI news we announced in May 2026
items.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from May 2026
items.title_zh: 我们于 2026 年 5 月公布的最新 AI 新闻
items.summary_zh: 以下是 Google 自 2026 年 5 月起最新的 AI 更新

items.title: David Autor named head of the Department of Economics
items.summary: A faculty member since 1999, Autor is a leading researcher in artificial intelligence and the work of the future.
items.title_zh: 大卫·奥托尔被任命为经济系系主任
items.summary_zh: Autor 自 1999 年起担任教员，是人工智能和未来工作领域的领先研究员。

items.title: LLMs help robots understand vague instructions and focus on key details
items.summary: To help robots do chores in places like homes and factories, a new approach from MIT uses one language model to clarify users’ instructions, then another to ignore irrelevant info.
items.title_zh: 法学硕士帮助机器人理解模糊的指令并专注于关键细节
items.summary_zh: 为了帮助机器人在家庭和工厂等地方做家务，麻省理工学院的一种新方法使用一种语言模型来澄清用户的指令，然后使用另一种语言模型来忽略不相关的信息。

items.title: Exploring the societal impacts of AI
items.summary: During the AI and Society Forum, leading MIT researchers examined critical questions about AI’s influence on employment and democracy.
items.title_zh: 探索人工智能的社会影响
items.summary_zh: 在人工智能与社会论坛期间，麻省理工学院的主要研究人员研究了有关人工智能对就业和民主影响的关键问题。

items.title: Michael Burry says he's shorting Caterpillar for the first time after it nearly doubled in the AI-driven rally of 2026
items.summary: "Caterpillar jumped out at me," Burry said. "I have never shorted Caterpillar. It has always done great for me on the long side in the past."
items.title_zh: 迈克尔·伯里 (Michael Burry) 表示，在 2026 年人工智能驱动的反弹中，卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar) 几乎翻了一番后，他首次做空卡特彼勒 (Caterpillar)
items.summary_zh: “毛毛虫向我扑来，”伯里说。 “我从未做空卡特彼勒。过去，它在做多方面一直对我有很大帮助。”

items.title: Small-cap stocks enjoy their best first half in 35 years. Here's what's driving it
items.summary: The advance marks a sharp turnaround after years of underperformance versus large-cap peers.
items.title_zh: 小盘股上半年表现 35 年来最好。这就是推动它的因素
items.summary_zh: 此次上涨标志着多年来与大盘股相比表现不佳之后的急剧转变。

items.title: China's economy picks up in June on rebounding U.S. exports, analysts say
items.summary: China's economy is showing signs of picking up after a sluggish few months — thanks in part to a rebound in shipments to the U.S.
items.title_zh: 分析师称，美国出口反弹，中国经济六月回升
items.summary_zh: 中国经济在经历了几个月的低迷之后，正显示出复苏的迹象，部分原因是对美国的出口量出现反弹。

items.title: CFTC is conducting an investigation into Polymarket, source says
items.summary: The probe comes after the Commodity Futures Trading Commission and the Department of Justice dropped previous inquiries into Polymarket last July.
items.title_zh: 消息人士称，CFTC 正在对 Polymarket 进行调查
items.summary_zh: 此次调查是在商品期货交易委员会和司法部去年 7 月撤销之前对 Polymarket 的调查之后进行的。

items.title: OpenAI is reportedly delaying its IPO. Here's when Kalshi traders think it will announce
items.summary: Speculators think the OpenAI IPO will come early next year, with only one-in-three odds it happens in 2026 but a high likelihood it is done by June 2027.
items.title_zh: 据报道，OpenAI 正在推迟 IPO。这是卡尔什交易员认为会宣布的时间
items.summary_zh: 投机者认为 OpenAI IPO 将于明年初进行，2026 年发生的可能性只有三分之一，但很有可能在 2027 年 6 月完成。

items.title: US Supreme Court upholds birthright citizenship in blow to Trump
items.summary: The ruling is a major setback for Donald Trump's immigration agenda, and has been welcomed by civil rights groups.
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院维持与生俱来的公民身份，对特朗普造成打击
items.summary_zh: 这项裁决是唐纳德·特朗普移民议程的重大挫折，并受到民权组织的欢迎。

items.title: US Supreme Court has dealt heavy defeats to Trump, while expanding his power
items.summary: The birthright ruling brings to an end a Supreme Court term that has delivered the president some key victories.
items.title_zh: 美国最高法院惨败特朗普，同时扩大其权力
items.summary_zh: 与生俱来的权利裁决结束了最高法院的任期，该任期为总统带来了一些关键的胜利。

items.title: Three-year-old rescued and taken to hospital six days after Venezuela quake
items.summary: Video footage shows rescuers cheering as the child is pulled from rubble in La Guaira state.
items.title_zh: 委内瑞拉地震六天后，三岁儿童获救并送往医院
items.summary_zh: 视频片段显示，当孩子从拉瓜伊拉州的废墟中被救出时，救援人员欢呼雀跃。

items.title: A plane crashed into a tower in Beijing but China is not saying what happened
items.summary: The collision left holes on the side of the tower, but Beijing has scrubbed other visible traces of the incident.
items.title_zh: 一架飞机撞上北京的一座塔楼，但中国没有透露发生了什么
items.summary_zh: 碰撞在塔的一侧留下了洞，但北京已经清除了该事件的其他明显痕迹。

items.title: Roof collapse kills 14 children at Pakistan tuition centre
items.summary: Two people are taken into custody after the incident in the Kahna suburb of Lahore.
items.title_zh: 巴基斯坦补习中心屋顶倒塌造成14名儿童死亡
items.summary_zh: 拉合尔卡赫纳郊区事件发生后，两人被拘留。

items.title: What are US and Japanese soldiers doing in the middle of the Australian bush?
items.summary: The BBC's Katy Watson explains why troops are training in remote Australia, thousands of kilometres from any major conflicts.
items.title_zh: 美国和日本士兵在澳大利亚丛林中做什么？
items.summary_zh: 英国广播公司 (BBC) 的凯蒂·沃森 (Katy Watson) 解释了为什么军队要在距离任何重大冲突数千公里的偏远澳大利亚进行训练。

items.title: 'Absolute madness': Row over plan to demolish Nazi bunker under Berlin
items.summary: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
items.title_zh: “绝对疯狂”：拆除柏林地下纳粹地堡的计划引发争议
items.summary_zh: 市政府官员希望在市中心建造公寓，但其他人则表示，它应该作为德国历史的一部分予以保留。

items.title: Firefighters struggle to contain deadly Greek wildfire
items.summary: More than 100 firefighters are fighting a fire near Thessaloniki which has claimed at least two lives.
items.title_zh: 消防员努力控制致命的希腊野火
items.summary_zh: 100 多名消防员正在塞萨洛尼基附近灭火，这场火灾已造成至少两人死亡。

items.title: Thousands of anti-migrant protesters march in South Africa amid heavy police presence
items.summary: Foreigners have already left South Africa ahead of the deadline set by anti-migrant groups.
items.title_zh: 南非数千名反移民抗议者在大量警察驻守下游行
items.summary_zh: 外国人已经在反移民组织设定的最后期限之前离开南非。

items.title: The Hidden Dead: The True Toll in Venezuela Is Buried Under Rubble
items.summary: Five days after devastating twin earthquakes flattened entire residential neighborhoods, experts fear the official death toll of 1,719 could be a serious undercount.
items.title_zh: 隐藏的死者：委内瑞拉的真实死亡人数被埋在瓦砾下
items.summary_zh: 毁灭性的两次地震将整个住宅区夷为平地五天后，专家担心官方公布的 1,719 人死亡人数可能严重低估。

items.title: U.S. and Iran to Meet with Mediators in Qatar
items.summary: American and Iranian officials are in the Gulf state, a key intermediary between the two countries, days after new round of attacks threatened efforts to sign a lasting peace deal.
items.title_zh: 美国和伊朗将在卡塔尔会见调解员
items.summary_zh: 就在新一轮袭击威胁到签署持久和平协议的努力几天后，美国和伊朗官员正在这个海湾国家，两国之间的重要中间人。

items.title: The Prom Went On in Kyiv, but Masha’s Date Danced Alone
items.summary: Masha Polska, 15, was an avid dancer who had been dreaming of a star turn in the group waltz. That was not to be.
items.title_zh: 舞会在基辅继续进行，但玛莎的约会对象独自跳舞
items.summary_zh: 15 岁的玛莎·波尔斯卡 (Masha Polska) 是一位狂热的舞者，一直梦想着成为集体华尔兹的明星。但事实并非如此。

items.title: Shortages of Rescue Equipment Hampered Venezuela’s Earthquake Response
items.summary: Residents appealed for excavators, generators and specialized rescue tools as civilians have stepped in to supply crews working through the rubble.
items.title_zh: 救援设备短缺阻碍了委内瑞拉的地震应对
items.summary_zh: 随着平民介入为在废墟中工作的人员提供物资，居民们呼吁提供挖掘机、发电机和专用救援工具。

items.title: World Cup Loss Dominates German News, Displacing Even a Mass Shooting
items.summary: A day after a deadly attack in northern Germany, the news media’s attention largely shifted to the country’s poor performance at the World Cup.
items.title_zh: 世界杯失利占据了德国新闻的主导地位，甚至取代了大规模枪击事件
items.summary_zh: 德国北部发生致命袭击事件一天后，新闻媒体的注意力主要转向该国在世界杯上的糟糕表现。

items.title: Parcel Bomb Explodes in Monaco, Injuring 3
items.summary: The blast seriously injured three people, including a child, according to the authorities, who said the assailant was on the run.
items.title_zh: 摩纳哥包裹炸弹爆炸，造成 3 人受伤
items.summary_zh: 当局称，爆炸造成三人重伤，其中包括一名儿童，袭击者目前在逃。

items.title: Norway’s ‘Viking Row’ Is a Fan Phenomenon at the World Cup
items.summary: Seas of red-clad Norwegian supporters are rowing shoulder to shoulder at stadiums, schools, even a nursing home. Not everyone is thrilled.
items.title_zh: 挪威的“维京行”是世界杯上的球迷现象
items.summary_zh: 身穿红衣的挪威支持者如海在体育场、学校甚至疗养院并肩划船。并不是每个人都感到兴奋。

items.title: What Italy’s Failure to Make the Soccer World Cup Says About Its Wider Woes
items.summary: For some Italians, their team’s absence from the biggest tournament in soccer is a metaphor for a broader national malaise.
items.title_zh: 意大利未能进入足球世界杯说明了其更广泛的困境
items.summary_zh: 对于一些意大利人来说，他们的球队缺席这项最大的足球赛事是一种更广泛的全国性不适的隐喻。

items.title: U.S. senators seek to block foreign adversaries from AI technology in new bill
items.summary: Senators Tim Scott and Bill Hagerty, who managed to push the crypto GENIUS Act into law, introduced the bill to give the government powers to defend U.S. AI.
items.title_zh: 美国参议员在新法案中寻求阻止外国对手使用人工智能技术
items.summary_zh: 参议员蒂姆·斯科特（Tim Scott）和比尔·哈格蒂（Bill Hagerty）成功地将《加密天才法案》推入法律，他们提出了该法案，赋予政府捍卫美国人工智能的权力。

items.title: Phantom doubles down on perpetual futures with hire of Hyperliquid market builders
items.summary: The crypto wallet is doubling down on perpetual futures after hiring the builders behind one of Hyperliquid's highest-profile market experiments.
items.title_zh: Phantom 通过聘请 Hyperliquid 市场建设者加倍押注永续期货
items.summary_zh: 在聘请了 Hyperliquid 最引人注目的市场实验之一背后的开发者后，该加密钱包正在加倍投资永续期货。

items.title: Companies spending the most on AI are growing jobs, Ramp study finds
items.summary: A new study from Ramp found companies making the biggest investments in AI are expanding their workforces, with heavy adopters increasing headcount by about 10% and entry-level hiring by 12%, challenging fears that generative AI is already causing widespread job losses.
items.title_zh: Ramp 研究发现，在人工智能上投入最多的公司正在增加就业机会
items.summary_zh: Ramp 的一项新研究发现，在人工智能方面投资最多的公司正在扩大员工队伍，其中重度采用者将员工人数增加了约 10%，初级员工人数增加了 12%，这挑战了人们对生成式人工智能已经导致广泛失业的担忧。

items.title: President Trump’s financial disclosures show hundreds of millions in crypto-related income
items.summary: Trump disclosed over $65 million from equity sales and $236 million in World Liberty token proceeds.
items.title_zh: 特朗普总统的财务披露显示数亿美元的加密货币相关收入
items.summary_zh: 特朗普披露了超过 6500 万美元的股权出售收益和 2.36 亿美元的 World Liberty 代币收益。

items.title: ENS co-founder Nick Johnson blocks Security Council renewal with 80% of votes
items.summary: Johnson cited unaddressed concerns with the Security Council while backing an alternative proposal submitted on Tuesday.
items.title_zh: ENS 联合创始人尼克·约翰逊以 80% 的票数阻止安理会续任
items.summary_zh: 约翰逊引用了安理会未解决的担忧，同时支持周二提交的替代提案。

items.title: OKX AI unveils marketplace for agents to find work and get paid in stablecoins
items.summary: “Think Upwork for Agents with our fintech infrastructure and 150M scale in the background," an OKX rep said.
items.title_zh: OKX AI 推出了代理商寻找工作并通过稳定币获得报酬的市场
items.summary_zh: “在我们的金融科技基础设施和后台 1.5 亿规模的背景下，为代理商考虑 Upwork，”OKX 代表表示。

items.title: New Zcash nonprofit Sovright unveils ZEC wallet recovery tool
items.summary: Argos is a recovery tool for users who had shielded funds stuck on ZEC Wallet Lite, an issue impacting some longtime Zcash supporters.
items.title_zh: 新的 Zcash 非营利组织 Sovright 推出 ZEC 钱包恢复工具
items.summary_zh: Argos 是一款恢复工具，适用于那些被困在 ZEC Wallet Lite 上的资金被困的用户，这个问题影响了一些 Zcash 的长期支持者。

items.title: Sharplink buys 10,000 ETH, repurchases 2.13 million SBET shares in latest buyback
items.summary: Sharplink bought 10,000 ETH and repurchased 2.13 million SBET shares after completing a $75 million capital raise.
items.title_zh: Sharplink在最新回购中购买了10,000 ETH，并回购了213万股SBET股票
items.summary_zh: Sharplink 在完成 7500 万美元融资后购买了 10,000 ETH 并回购了 213 万股 SBET 股票。

items.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
items.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.
items.title_zh: ChatGPT 的采用范围如何扩大
items.summary_zh: 新的 OpenAI Signals 数据显示了 ChatGPT 在全球范围内的采用情况如何增长，用户使用量不断增加，探索更多功能，并推动跨地区和语言的增长。

items.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
items.title_zh: Genebench-Pro 内部

items.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
items.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.
items.title_zh: 绘制欧洲人工智能劳动力机会图
items.summary_zh: 一份新的 OpenAI 报告描绘了人工智能如何重塑整个欧盟的就业机会，强调哪些职业可能面临自动化、增长或工作流程变化。

items.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
items.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.
items.title_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 LLM 优化的推理芯片
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 和 Broadcom 推出 Jalapeo，这是一款专为 LLM 推理而构建的定制 AI 芯片，旨在提高 AI 系统的性能、效率和规模。

items.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
items.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.
items.title_zh: 帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准
items.summary_zh: OpenAI 通过 Appia 基金会帮助建立先进人工智能的共享标准，支持评估框架、安全实践和全球合作。

items.title: ScarfBench: Benchmarking AI Agents for Enterprise Java Framework Migration
items.title_zh: ScarfBench：企业 Java 框架迁移的 AI 代理基准测试

items.title: Why Specialization Is Inevitable
items.title_zh: 为什么专业化是不可避免的

items.title: DiScoFormer: One transformer for density and score, across distributions
items.title_zh: DiScoFormer：一种跨分布的密度和分数转换器

items.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
items.title_zh: 通过一个命令在 HF 作业上运行 vLLM 服务器

items.title: Introducing the FFASR Leaderboard: Benchmarking ASR in the Real World
items.title_zh: FFASR 排行榜简介：现实世界中的 ASR 基准测试

items.title: Shipping huggingface_hub every week with AI, open tools, and a human in the loop
items.title_zh: 每周通过 AI、开放工具和人员参与交付 Huggingface_hub

items.title: Experimenting with the proposed Cross-Origin Storage API in Transformers.js
items.title_zh: 在 Transformers.js 中试验建议的跨域存储 API

items.title: PP-OCRv6 on Hugging Face: 50-Language OCR from 1.5M to 34.5M Parameters
items.title_zh: Hushing Face 上的 PP-OCRv6：从 1.5M 到 34.5M 参数的 50 种语言 OCR

items.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
items.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.
items.title_zh: 开启英国的下一个生产力时代：建设一个人工智能开拓者的国家
items.summary_zh: 谷歌英国分享了最新的经济影响报告，以及如何让更多人享受到人工智能技术带来的好处。

items.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
items.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.
items.title_zh: 问AI专家：全栈到底是什么？
items.summary_zh: 一位 Google 专家解释了采用全栈方法处理 AI 意味着什么，以及为什么它长期以来一直是我们 AI 工作的基础。

items.title: We’re strengthening our presence in Alabama through new investments and community support.
items.summary: Google has announced a $1.5 billion investment for 2026 and 2027 to expand its data center campus in Jackson County, Alabama. Operating since 2019 on a repurposed former…
items.title_zh: 我们正在通过新的投资和社区支持来加强我们在阿拉巴马州的业务。
items.summary_zh: 谷歌宣布在 2026 年和 2027 年投资 15 亿美元，扩建其位于阿拉巴马州杰克逊县的数据中心园区。自 2019 年起在改造后的前…

items.title: Our new community investments in Virginia support local jobs and expand energy affordability.
items.summary: We’re helping build the state’s next-generation workforce and investing in energy programs.
items.title_zh: 我们在弗吉尼亚州的新社区投资支持当地就业并扩大能源负担能力。
items.summary_zh: 我们正在帮助培养该州的下一代劳动力并投资能源项目。

items.title: 5 ways Google Search can level up your thrift and vintage shopping
items.summary: Uncover second-hand scores with AI tools in Google Search and Shopping.
items.title_zh: Google 搜索提升您的旧货购物水平的 5 种方式
items.summary_zh: 使用 Google 搜索和购物中的 AI 工具发现二手乐谱。

items.title: How we used Gemini to build Google I/O 2026
items.summary: Learn how Googlers used AI to produce Google I/O 2026.
items.title_zh: 我们如何使用 Gemini 构建 Google I/O 2026
items.summary_zh: 了解 Google 员工如何利用 AI 打造 Google I/O 2026。

items.title: Take our I/O 2026 quiz, vibe coded in Google AI Studio.
items.summary: We used Google AI Studio to vibe code a quiz about our top I/O 2026 announcements.
items.title_zh: 参加我们的 I/O 2026 测验，在 Google AI Studio 中进行编码。
items.summary_zh: 我们使用 Google AI Studio 编写了一个有关 I/O 2026 重要公告的测验。

items.title: Q&A: What is agentic AI today, and what do we want it to be?
items.summary: Computer scientist Phillip Isola cuts through the hype to explain how AI agents work and what the future might hold for this rapidly advancing technology.
items.title_zh: 问答：今天的代理人工智能是什么？我们希望它是什么？
items.summary_zh: 计算机科学家 Phillip Isola 打破了炒作，解释了人工智能代理的工作原理以及这项快速发展的技术的未来。

items.title: 3 Questions: Beyond data-driven aesthetics
items.summary: In a new Keller Gallery exhibition, Alexandros Haridis SM ’17, PhD ’22 traces centuries of ideas about aesthetic judgment and explores how design can make complex computational systems visible.
items.title_zh: 3 个问题：超越数据驱动的美学
items.summary_zh: 在凯勒画廊的新展览中，Alexandros Haridis SM '17、PhD '22 追溯了几个世纪以来有关审美判断的想法，并探索了设计如何使复杂的计算系统变得可见。

items.title: MIT in the media: Exploring how curiosity-driven science is an essential ingredient in America’s success
items.summary: “Scientific American” showcases the history and future of America’s scientific engine, highlighting promising young scientists and icons at MIT and beyond.
items.title_zh: 媒体中的麻省理工学院：探索好奇心驱动的科学如何成为美国成功的重要因素
items.summary_zh: 《科学美国人》展示了美国科学引擎的历史和未来，重点关注麻省理工学院及其他地区有前途的年轻科学家和偶像。

items.title: Improving the speed and energy-efficiency of AI agents
items.summary: A new system, known as Murakkab, optimizes the design and deployment of multistep workflows that power AI applications.
items.title_zh: 提高人工智能代理的速度和能源效率
items.summary_zh: 名为 Murakkab 的新系统优化了支持人工智能应用程序的多步骤工作流程的设计和部署。
